# [Command] _netappfiles cache list_

List all Caches within the Capacity Pool

## Versions

### [2026-01-01](/Resources/mgmt-plane/L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMve30vcmVzb3VyY2Vncm91cHMve30vcHJvdmlkZXJzL21pY3Jvc29mdC5uZXRhcHAvbmV0YXBwYWNjb3VudHMve30vY2FwYWNpdHlwb29scy97fS9jYWNoZXM=/2026-01-01.xml) **Stable**

<!-- mgmt-plane /subscriptions/{}/resourcegroups/{}/providers/microsoft.netapp/netappaccounts/{}/capacitypools/{}/caches 2026-01-01 -->

#### examples

- Caches_List
    ```bash
        netappfiles cache list --resource-group myRG --account-name account1 --pool-name pool1
    ```
